data.title: DESIGN.md doc accuracy: pairings luminance model + rounded semantic roles

data.body: Doc-only task (DESIGN.md). Two corrections from user design.md review: (1) House/text pairings — replace any hardcoded list with the luminance-driven rule the code actually uses (charcoal foreground on LIGHT houses: Visit, Events, Story; cream/background text on DARK houses: Campus, Education, Publications, PoliticalClub). Use foreground-muted (not the deleted foreground-light) for secondary text. Flag the Publications cream-on-pink contrast as a known concern. (2) Rounded radii — document semantic roles: rounded-sm=images, rounded-md=interactive controls + containers, rounded-lg=cards; rounded-full=pill shapes (tag-filter pills + accent bars); drop the dead rounded-xl mention. No code changes.

REVIEW — PASS (with trivial inline fix). Reviewed cold against grep-verified source.

ACCURACY (all confirmed):
- House bg+text mappings exact: Visit/Events use bg-house-*-light + text-foreground (charcoal); Story (non-house) bg-background + text-foreground; Campus(bg-house-campus-light), Education(bg-house-education-deep), PoliticalClub(bg-house-political-club-deep), Publications/Lab(bg-house-publications-light) all + text-background (cream). Luminance point holds: Campus & Publications use -light bg tokens yet cream text. Hexes verified in src/index.css: campus-light #2E6B4A, publications-light #E870A0.
- foreground-light: 0 occurrences in src/ (token gone); doc correctly cites text-foreground-muted (#525252, --foreground-muted 0% 32%) as live secondary.
- Publications cream-on-pink flag accurate: LabPage.tsx:17 floods bg-house-publications-light under text-background.
- Rounded radii verified: rounded-sm=1 (GalleryImage images); rounded-md=many (button.tsx, Hero combobox, Navbar menu buttons, NeighborhoodPage note, EventsPage embed, badge icons = interactive controls + containers); rounded-lg=3 (ArchiveSearch, DocumentBadge, StoryPage TalkCard = cards); rounded-full=3 (TagFilter pills + 2 accent bars); rounded-xl=0 live uses (--radius-xl:1rem still in index.css:61, doc parenthetical 'declared but unused' is correct).

INLINE FIX (trivial): Edit removed the 'four canonical pairings' table but a stale cross-reference survived at the Do's bullet (line 345: 'per the four canonical pairings'), which contradicted the new luminance model. Rewrote it to 'driven by the surface's perceived luminance (light → charcoal; dark/saturated → cream).' Amended into the same commit. No 'four canonical' refs remain.

SCOPE: diff is DESIGN.md + plan file only; no source/CSS/YAML-token changes. All acceptance criteria met.
